description_long: This is a lifelike gray tabby cat with a short, dense coat featuring subtle dark stripes and a lighter underbelly. The cat has a well-proportioned, muscular body, standing on all four legs with its tail held upright and slightly curved at the tip. Its face is triangular with prominent, upright ears, large yellow-green eyes, and a small, pinkish nose. The legs are sturdy and end in small, rounded paws. The fur pattern is consistent across the body, with faint striping visible on the sides and legs. No collar or accessories are present, and the overall appearance is that of a healthy, alert domestic cat.
description: A realistic gray tabby cat with subtle stripes, upright tail, and alert yellow-green eyes. The cat stands on all fours with a muscular build and no visible collar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cat's triangular face, upright ears, and forward-facing yellow-green eyes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cat's muscular body, subtle striping, and upright, slightly curved tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and the tail held upright and slightly curved.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cat's profile, striping, and tail position.
attribute_fur_pattern: striped gray tabby with subtle dark stripes and lighter underbelly
